name: Ananya Rao
quote: The mock GDs completely changed how I structure arguments under pressure. Went from rambling to being the first shortlisted in my batch for Deloitte.

name: Kartik Bahl
quote: I cleared 3 case rounds back-to-back because of the practice sessions. The mentor gave feedback no coaching centre ever did — honest, specific, actionable.

name: Divya Menon
quote: The FMCG live project gave me real data to talk about in every interview. Recruiters at P&G asked about it for 20 minutes — that's when I knew it worked.

name: Sahil Verma
quote: Won my college case competition after just 2 weeks of training here. The structured approach to frameworks is something no classroom teaches you.

name: Pooja Tiwari
quote: The Excel + Analytics cert gave my resume a technical edge recruiters noticed. Three interviewers mentioned it specifically.

name: Aditya Kumar
quote: From zero prep to Day 1 shortlist — MBA Partner made that happen for me. Worth every rupee and more, the cohort network is still valuable months later.

name: Riya Singh
quote: The 1-on-1 mentor feedback on my resume was brutally honest — in the best way. I rewrote it twice and both times it got significantly better.

name: Nikhil Patel
quote: Working on a real startup project meant I wasn't just theorizing in interviews. Flipkart's PM interviewer said my project showed 'actual product thinking'.

name: Mehak Arora
quote: The frameworks I learned here are what I use to crack every PI question now. Consulting interviews feel structured instead of intimidating.

name: Tanmay Ghosh
quote: Best investment I made for placements — 10x ROI in terms of confidence alone. Morgan Stanley asked me about the live project in round 1, round 2, and round 3.
